subtitle.text:
Additional context: "SpaceX is coming to Solana" refers to preSPAX, a digital token issued by Republic and launched on Bitget, designed to track SpaceX's post-IPO performance. It is not affiliated with SpaceX and does not grant actual equity.

bitget.com/news/detail/12…

beincrypto.com/bitget-ipo-pri…

tweets.full_text:
What happened last week on @solanamobile ?

> Milestone : dApp Store crossed 750+ apps. Seeker is quickly becoming the default mobile Web3 hub 🏆 
> @sanctumso is live, earn XP by staking SOL ☁️
> @seekerclaw biggest update so far. your Seeker, your Agent🦞
> @colosseum Frontier Hackathon has commenced, launch to over 115k power users on Seeker and find PMF.
> @SOLYD_STORE announced their Easter Mania with hidden prizes 👀
> @monkebounce available now on the Solana dApp Store, exclusively on Seeker with a special Monke character in-game
> @WURKDOTFUN offers exclusive jobs accessible only through Seeker
> @Axis_pizza is bringing the first decentralized crypto ETF experience directly to Seeker
> @cherrydotfun opened international Seeker-gated chats for people to connect in their own language
> @VeryAI helps verify real humans and prevent deepfakes
> @BananaZoneApp is now available on the dApp Store
> @rampa_cash can now be found on the dApp Stor
> Seeker season 2 is live. Activity tracking is on.

Seek, and you shall find.

tweets.full_text:
WEEKLY SOLANA DIGEST

- @solana strengthens DeFi Security with: STRIDE. A comprehensive security program for all Solana DeFi. Includes hands-on evaluations and a  public repository of findings.

- @colosseum Solana's Frontier Hackathon commenced with $2.5 million from Colosseum's venture fund

 - @perena introduced Proof of Reserves for USD Star, powered by Zero Knowledge Proofs.

- @solflare users now get 60% OFF with @NetrunnerTax to handle their crypto taxes. Valid until the 🇺🇸 tax deadline on April 15!

- @stabble urged users to withdraw liquidity “temporarily” as a precaution with about 2M in TVL while its new team conducts fresh audits

- @JupiterExchange Active Staking Rewards went live and 50M JUP went out to eligible stakers!

- @sns announced .sol.site is now open to everyone. .sol domain holders automatically own a website. Works in any browser, on any device.

- @project0 Jupiter Lend is LIVE on Project 0, the prime engine now covers ~98% of Solana lending TVL with 8 isolated markets across Kamino, Drift, JupLend & P0-native.

- @USDC Crosschain forwarding is now live on solana for Circle CCTP and Bridge Kit

- @metamask Solana is now live on MetaMask Card across the US! Spend your Solana USDC anywhere @Mastercard is accepted.

- @MeteoraAG shipped 2 products, the new Create UI & new Portfolio page. One simple flow to set up your pool, add liquidity, visualise your bins and create your position.

- @Alchemy is backing Solana builders with a $20M infrastructure fund, offering up to $25k in free credits per team with no lock-in.

- @ManifestTrade announced Options markets are now live. Create Calls or List on the orderbook. Trade P2P trustlessly. Fully onchain

- @kamino Introduced Whitelisted Reserves: smart contract-enforced allocation controls for Kamino vaults

- @solstrategies Solana treasury company has acquired Darklake Labs for $1.2M to integrate zero-knowledge privacy tech and strengthen its infrastructure.

WEEKLY SOLANA DIGEST

- @solana strengthens DeFi Security with: STRIDE. A comprehensive security program for all Solana DeFi. Includes hands-on evaluations and a  public repository of findings.

- @colosseum Solana's Frontier Hackathon commenced with $2.5 million from Colosseum's venture fund

 - @perena introduced Proof of Reserves for USD Star, powered by Zero Knowledge Proofs.

- @solflare users now get 60% OFF with @NetrunnerTax to handle their crypto taxes. Valid until the 🇺🇸 tax deadline on April 15!

- @stabble urged users to withdraw liquidity “temporarily” as a precaution with about 2M in TVL while its new team conducts fresh audits

- @JupiterExchange Active Staking Rewards went live and 50M JUP went out to eligible stakers!

- @sns announced .sol.site is now open to everyone. .sol domain holders automatically own a website. Works in any browser, on any device.

- @project0 Jupiter Lend is LIVE on Project 0, the prime engine now covers ~98% of Solana lending TVL with 8 isolated markets across Kamino, Drift, JupLend & P0-native.

- @USDC Crosschain forwarding is now live on solana for Circle CCTP and Bridge Kit

- @metamask Solana is now live on MetaMask Card across the US! Spend your Solana USDC anywhere @Mastercard is accepted.

- @MeteoraAG shipped 2 products, the new Create UI & new Portfolio page. One simple flow to set up your pool, add liquidity, visualise your bins and create your position.

- @Alchemy is backing Solana builders with a $20M infrastructure fund, offering up to $25k in free credits per team with no lock-in.

- @ManifestTrade announced Options markets are now live. Create Calls or List on the orderbook. Trade P2P trustlessly. Fully onchain

- @kamino Introduced Whitelisted Reserves: smart contract-enforced allocation controls for Kamino vaults

- @solstrategies Solana treasury company has acquired Darklake Labs for $1.2M to integrate zero-knowledge privacy tech and strengthen its infrastructure.

No Investors, No VCs, No KOL Allocations, No Foundations, No Geopolitical Complexities...

Total Supply: 1,000,000,000 $HOOLI (Fixed)
Chain: Solana

Allocation:
- 60% Community Rewards: (Distributed based on mini-game starting on TGE)
- 10% Future Incentives (10% on TGE then https://t.co/jWRMArMGlx

result.text:
No Investors, No VCs, No KOL Allocations, No Foundations, No Geopolitical Complexities...

Total Supply: 1,000,000,000 $HOOLI (Fixed)
Chain: Solana

Allocation:
- 60% Community Rewards: (Distributed based on mini-game starting on TGE)
- 10% Future Incentives (10% on TGE then unlocked over 36 months)
- 10% Team (0% on TGE, 12-month lockup, then unlocked over 24 months)
- 15% Liquidity: (100% unlocked on TGE)
- 5% Marketing: (10% on TGE then unlocked over 24 months)

Community Rewards (60%)
To drive long-term distribution and foster community growth, HOOLI tokens are released through a gamified, participant-driven schedule. Starting at launch, distribution is determined by performance in Hooli’s browser-based mini-games and the strategic decisions of the players.

Future Incentives (10%)
Tokens will be used for major brand deals and the community, with promotion and activations around them. Strategically ring-fenced to drive brand expansion and community-led growth.

Team (10%)
To align core contributors and continue to build on the vision for HOOLI and the My Pet Hooligan universe. This schedule aims for sustained commitment to brand growth over a multi-year horizon. Locked for 12 months and then unlocked over 24 months.

Liquidity (15%)
To establish liquidity at launch. Reserved for listings, deposit campaigns and services to support accessible trading.

Marketing (5%)
To support brand reach, including partnerships, content distribution and cultural activations that expand the reach of My Pet Hooligan across entertainment and digital platforms.

HOOLI won't be a typical claim. All whitelisted wallets will get vouchers, some more than others depending on their allocations. You will choose to use these vouchers to either claim an amount of HOOLI on day one or get a larger allocation by participating in a mini-game. If you don't have vouchers you will be able to participate in the mini-game directly using HOOLI for the potential of performance based bonuses too. You make the decisions, the game delivers the rest.

More info to come…. EOT

> return as a state sponsored cyber soldier

result.text:
be a north korean hacker:

> spend years at secret hacker school
> get sent to China to learn the free internet
> return as a state sponsored cyber soldier
> pose as recruiter and dm devs
> promise $300K remote job
> get their resume
> mass apply for a remote IT job
> have 10 interviews per day
> spend months looking normal
> let team download malicious stuff
> compromise the platform
> bridge via Tornado Cash
> cashout via non KYC chinese exchange

⚡️@Solana continues to dominate across key on-chain metrics in March 2026 

🔸$57B DEX spot volume — #1 across all chains
🔸$17B stablecoin supply — new ATH

🔸182K RWA holders — surpassed Ethereum for the first time

Plus:
→ 94% of all-time tokenized equity volume settled on Solana
→ ~34M monthly active addresses
→ 3.2B+ transactions in 30 days
→ #1 in DEX volume for 32+ consecutive weeks

Solana isn’t just growing — it’s leading. 📈

tweets.full_text:
Yes, I’m down bad on all $JUP I haven’t sold

But to be honest, part of these tokens came from staking rewards and participating in the ecosystem.

Of course, it would’ve been more profitable to just sell, and we can blame Jupiter for many things, but have to admit - they have taken steps to reward stakers and participants, most governance tokens aren’t doing anything at all

I hope the ecosystem moves toward rev share and equity for holders - that’s when holding tokens will start to look better

Yes, I’m down bad on all $JUP I haven’t sold

But to be honest, part of these tokens came from staking rewards and participating in the ecosystem.

Of course, it would’ve been more profitable to just sell, and we can blame Jupiter for many things, but have to admit - they have taken steps to reward stakers and participants, most governance tokens aren’t doing anything at all

I hope the ecosystem moves toward rev share and equity for holders - that’s when holding tokens will start to look better

tweets.full_text:
.@SuperHighDeFi  shares @MeteoraAG update overview

“We've been doing a lot of these type of feedback loops with you guys because you guys are core users the LP Army, and I think that's a big part of what drives the kind of features that we ship. We want to make LPing more easy for you guys to start. After you start we want to make it easy for you to manage all your positions. And lastly, make it easy for you to level up.”

“Now with our improved version of portfolio, you can see at a glance all your DLMM positions, all your DAMM V2 positions. And from there, quickly zap out into SOL or USDC or claim your fees right from the portfolio page. On top of that we also give you breakdown of your PNL performance.”
